examples: While economic recessions hit some sectors hard, others go on like clockwork, or even experience growth.
He is home by six every day regular as clockwork.
The president's trip is arranged to go like clockwork, everything pre-planned to the minute.
That may be why Ed McCuen has a Powerball habit that's as regular as clockwork.
As we start another year, like clockwork, all the resolution stories start to appear.
